What We Do

Comprehensive Tax &
Accounting Services

From sole proprietors to corporations across Canada — we handle the numbers so you can focus on your business.

📊
Tax Planning & Advisory
Strategic corporate and personal tax planning — income splitting, holdco structures, owner-manager compensation, and year-end tax minimization.
T1 PersonalT2 CorporateHoldCo
🔄
Corporate Reorganization
Section 85 rollovers, share restructuring, estate freezes, and succession planning — tax-efficient transitions for your business.
S.85 RolloverEstate FreezeSuccession
📚
Bookkeeping
Monthly and quarterly bookkeeping, bank reconciliation, GST tracking, and QuickBooks Online setup and maintenance.
QuickBooksReconciliationGST Tracking
👥
Payroll Management
Full-cycle payroll processing, CRA remittances, Records of Employment, T4 slips, employment contracts, and payroll compliance.
T4 SlipsROECRA Remittance
🏛️
CRA Audit & Dispute Support
Audit representation, responding to CRA review letters, filing notices of objection, voluntary disclosure program, and taxpayer relief.
Audit RepVDPObjections
🧾
GST/HST Compliance
Registration, quarterly and annual filing, input tax credit optimization, and CRA GST audit defense for Alberta businesses.
ITC OptimizationFilingRegistration
💼
Business Advisory
New incorporation, business plan preparation, financial due diligence, buy/sell transaction support, and shareholder agreement review.
IncorporationDue DiligenceBuy/Sell
🏠
Real Estate Tax
GST on new housing, property flips, rental income reporting, principal residence exemption, and bare trust filing compliance.
New Housing GSTFlipsBare Trusts
🌿
Financial Statements
Notice-to-reader financial statements for small private corporations — prepared for bank financing, shareholder use, and CRA purposes.
NTRGIFIYear-End
About the Firm

Canada-Wide.
Client-Focused.

Pannu Accounting & Tax Services Inc. is a tax and advisory practice serving individuals, small businesses, and corporations across Canada.

We specialize in keeping things simple — plain-language advice, proactive tax planning, and year-round support so you're never caught off guard by CRA.

We serve a diverse client base across Canada — real estate, construction, retail, professional services, and new Canadians building their businesses. In-person and remote consultations available.

Book a Consultation Email Us
PA
Director & Principal Advisor
Pannu Accounting & Tax Services Inc.
  • Senior-level expertise in Canadian corporate and personal tax
  • Deep expertise in T2 corporate returns, GST/HST, CCA schedules, and inter-corporate dividends
  • CRA audit representation and voluntary disclosure experience
  • Serving Canadian businesses across real estate, services, construction, and retail
  • Flexible appointment scheduling available

Stay Ahead of CRA

Practical tax tips for Canadian businesses and individuals — updated regularly.

Corporate Tax
June 2026
Owner-Manager Salary vs. Dividend: What's Better in 2026?
The optimal mix depends on your marginal rate, CPP preferences, and RRSP room. Here's how to think through the decision for the current tax year.

CRA Alert
May 2026
Bare Trust Reporting: What Alberta Property Owners Need to Know
CRA's bare trust T3 filing rules have caused confusion. We break down who must file, what's exempt, and what happens if you miss the deadline.
Ask us about this →
GST/HST
April 2026
New Housing GST Rebate: Are You Leaving Money on the Table?
Many Canadian homebuyers and builders miss out on thousands in GST rebates. We walk through who qualifies and how to claim before the deadline.
